description_te: ప్రభుత్వ పాఠశాల విద్యార్థులకు 3 జతల uniforms + shoes + socks + belt + textbooks + notebooks. ₹3,000-₹4,000 విలువైన kit.
description_en: Free school kit for government school students: 3 pairs of uniforms + shoes + socks + belt + textbooks + notebooks. Kit worth ₹3,000-₹4,000.

eligibility_criteria.enrollment: Students enrolled in government / aided schools

mandatory: No separate documents — school enrollment is sufficient

benefit_amount: Kit worth ₹3,000-₹4,000 (3 uniforms + shoes + socks + belt + textbooks + notebooks)
application_process_te: ప్రత్యేక apply అవసరం లేదు. ప్రతి academic year beginning లో school ద్వారా distribute.
